hero_h1: Your hyperlocal radar for Lima's Asian ecosystem
hero_sub: Connect with specialized stores in San Borja, Lince and Lima's Chinatown. Real inventory, transparent prices, exact navigation.
step1_body: Find Asian products by name, category or zone.
step2_body: Check the exact address, floor and stand of the nearest store.
step3_body: No wasted trips. Verified inventory before you leave.
segments_sub: Whether you're an Asian culture fan or a business owner, GeoPS is made for you.
b2c_p1_desc: Access thousands of Asian ecosystem items you won't find anywhere else.
b2c_p2_desc: Compare stores and always choose the best option with full transparency.
b2c_p3_desc: Navigate arcades with precision. Never get lost in Arenales or Calle Capón again.
b2c_visual_title: Discover the best Asian flavors near you
b2b_p1_desc: Appear in results for thousands of users actively searching in your area.
b2b_p2_desc: Share discounts directly to users interested in your category.
b2b_p3_desc: Your business visible to the community that values what you offer most.
video_prod_sub: See how GeoPS connects consumers and stores in Lima's Asian ecosystem in one place.
video_prod_desc: Discover how thousands of users in Lima already find their favorite Asian products with GeoPS.
video_team_sub: The people behind GeoPS: passionate about Asian culture and technology in service of Lima's community.
video_team_desc: A multidisciplinary team united by the mission of digitalizing Lima's Asian ecosystem.
qa1_a: GeoPS is open to anyone interested in Lima's Asian ecosystem: consumers looking for specific products, Asian culture enthusiasts, and merchants who want to digitalize their business.
qa2_q: What benefits do I get as a customer?
qa2_a: You access a verified catalog of Asian products and stores in Lima, with transparent prices, real-time stock, indoor navigation in arcades, and catalogs translated into Spanish.
qa3_q: What benefits do I get as a provider?
qa3_a: You increase your visibility to thousands of active users, publish promotions immediately, manage your inventory online, and receive verified reviews that build trust.
qa4_a: If you are a consumer, GeoPS is completely free — just create your account and start exploring. If you have a business and want to join the platform:
qa4_cta: I'm a business, I want to join
footer_tagline: Your hyperlocal radar for Lima's Asian ecosystem.
